Research & Publications

Contributing to the advancement of sports medicine and orthopedic surgery through research, publications, and continuous learning.

Paper Presentations

Pigmented Villo Nodular Synovitis of Hoffa's Fat Pad

2018

Treatment with 70 degree arthroscope and superolateral portal

Indian Arthroscopy Society Annual Conference (IASCON 2018)

Single Stage Bilateral Total Hip and Knee Arthroplasty in Young Adult with Ankylosing Spondylitis

2018

Indian Orthopedic Association Annual Conference (IOACON 2018)

Return to Sports after ACL Reconstruction with Hamstring Graft

2021

Systematic review of hamstring strength recovery, psychological readiness and proprioception changes

Indian Orthopedic Association Annual Conference (IOACON 2021)

Research Activities

Cancer Markers Study

2012

Worked with Prof. Dr. Gopal Kundu (NCCS, Pune) on "Development of potential early prognostic and diagnostic markers for breast and other cancers"

Morphometric Analysis of Tibial Footprint of ACL

2015

Worked at Ganga Hospital, Coimbatore as Dr. Prof. S. Rajasekaran Research Understudy. MRI-based study of anthropometric measurements in Indian population.

Dissertations

Outcome of Chondral & Osteochondral Lesions of Patello-Femoral Instability

2016-2019

Dissertation for Masters degree in Orthopaedics at Dr. D.Y. Patil Medical College, Pune

Return to Sports after ACL Reconstruction with Hamstring Graft

2020-2021

Systematic review of hamstring strength recovery, psychological readiness and proprioception changes. Dissertation for Masters in Sports Medicine at University College London.
